Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the first occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection until SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Total time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer Selection is now due across all variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Average time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to be followed by any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, SW-Reviewer Unavailable)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total elapsed time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to the final decision activity (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision) in traces containing SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants where reviewers are successfully assigned without reminders
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Total time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late in delayed assignment variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection when followed by multiple SW-AE Assign Reviewers repetitions
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in successful review paths involving SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'
